hooks.command: bash -c 'cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || echo .)" && if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain)" ]; then git add -A && git commit -m "auto: iteration commit $(date +"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M")" && git push origin HEAD 2>&1 && echo "[git-agent] Changes pushed to GitHub"; else echo "[git-agent] Nothing to commit"; fi'
